title: Avoid overriding reserved environment variable names in Lambda functions
description: Lambda functions should not override reserved environment variable names to prevent unintended behavior.
message: Avoid overriding reserved environment variable names in Lambda functions.
impact: Function behavior can be unintended or unpredictable.

compliant.description: Printing the AWS_REGION environment variable without overriding.

why_is_this_an_issue: Overriding reserved environment variable names can lead to unintended behavior or security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Use non-reserved environment variable names or set the variable outside the Lambda function.
